title: Opportunity to fly in rear seat of Spitfire from Prestwick

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A one-in-a-lifetime opportunity to fly in the rear seat of a Spitfire from Prestwick Airport will cost at least £8,000.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. A once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to fly in the rear seat of a Spitfire from Prestwick Airport will cost at least £8,000.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: As part of the aircraft's 90th birthday, a series of flights are being held up and down the country to mark the occasion by The Spitfire Academy. If you win the auction, you will fly in the rear seat of a Spitfire BS410, a genuine wartime aircraft that fought in World War II.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bids to fly in rear seat of Spitfire from Prestwick Airport reach £8k
